person.wealth_source: Diane Hendricks co-founded ABC Supply Co. with her late husband Ken Hendricks in 1981; the company became the largest wholesale distributor of roofing, siding, and windows in North America. Her net worth is primarily concentrated in ABC Supply stock.

net_worth.range_note: Forbes RTB seed; range is ±15% to acknowledge stock-price volatility.
net_worth.liquidity_notes: Wealth is heavily concentrated in ABC Supply Co. stock (private company), with limited liquid diversification.

rollup.tier_reasoning: Hendricks presents a structural opacity case: ABC Supply stock concentration (75% illiquid) and a family foundation with no public 990-PF record in the pipeline mean observable giving cannot yet be verified. She has not signed the Giving Pledge, and without foundation payout data or disclosed personal grants, the gap between her $22B net worth and any measurable philanthropic activity remains unknown. The tier will clarify once foundation filings surface.
rollup.expected_5pct_tenure_method: 5% × net_worth_best × liquidity_pct × years_as_billionaire (uncapped tenure); computed by aggregate_v3.py
